Loading dependencies and data set

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stargazer)
library(modelsummary)

df <- wooldridge::kielmc
```

Summary statistics

```{r}
stargazer(df, type = "text")
```

```{r}
simple_model <- lm(rprice ~ nearinc, data = df %>% filter(year == 1981))
modelsummary(simple_model, stars = c("*" = .10, "**" = .05, "***" = .01),)
```
